titles.title: My Sins We're Higher Than the Mountain (2)

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: My Sins Were Higher Than The Mountain, When The Lord Sanctified Me. My Sins Were Higher Than The Mountain, When The Lord Sanctified Me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Singing “Glory Hallelujah!”, When The Fire Came Down, When The Fire Came Down, When The Fire Came Down. Singing “Glory Hallelujah!”, When The Fire Came When The Lord Sanctified Me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: My Sins Were Deeper Than The Ocean, When The Lord Sanctified Me. My Sins Were Deeper Than The Ocean, When The Lord Sanctified Me.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: My Sins Were Flowing Like A River, When The Lord Sanctified Me. My Sins Were Flowing Like A River, When The Lord Sanctified Me.
